description: Fix issues from code review: (1) Duplicate popup_message/popup_product form field names causing data loss, (2) Popup DB query on every page load without caching, (3) Add throttle middleware to invoice route.
steps: Fix duplicate form field names in resources/views/admin/promotions/index.blade.php by using x-bind:name to conditionally set field names only on the active mode's fields
Wrap the Product::where() query in resources/views/partials/popup.blade.php with Cache::remember() using a 5 minute TTL
Add throttle middleware to the invoice route in routes/web.php
acceptance_criteria: No duplicate name attributes exist in the DOM for popup_message and popup_product fields - only the active mode's fields have the name set
The popup partial caches the product query with a short TTL
The invoice route has rate limiting applied
All modified PHP files pass php -l
All modified Blade views have balanced directives
verification: Verify Blade directive balance in admin/promotions/index.blade.php and partials/popup.blade.php
Grep for throttle in routes/web.php on the invoice route
findings: All three review issues fixed. Used Alpine.js x-bind:name (`:name`) with ternary expressions to conditionally set the name attribute only on the active popup mode's form fields - when the mode is not active, name resolves to null so the field is excluded from form submission. Wrapped Product::where() in Cache::remember() with a 300 second (5 min) TTL keyed by product ID. Added throttle:10,1 middleware to the invoice route for 10 requests per minute rate limit. All files pass php -l syntax check and Blade directives are balanced.
